design_plan: rng_seed=42; AIDA_pass=true; hero_lines=2.4; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_checked=true; button_contrast=AA;
headline: Super vs Folk — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Folk for people evaluating personal AI agents. Folk is useful for lightweight relationship management and workflow tracking. Super is built for durable, repeated computer-use workflows, with a reusable computer-use cache that lowers cost and friction over time.
